sourceMovie.title: Freelance
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Freelance for the same reason it broke through in 2023: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Pierre Morel keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Freelance clicked for you, Deadpool (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Freelance?
faq.answer: Try Deadpool, Spy, 6 Underground—each shares DNA with Freelance while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Freelance?
faq.answer: Freelance (2023) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Freelance worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
